title: War Powers May 1 deadline looms: legal debate over whether ceasefire pauses the 60-day clock
snippet: Legal analysis of the approaching May 1 War Powers Act 60-day deadline. Key question: does the ceasefire period toll the clock? Administration argues cessation of hostilities pauses the 60-day requirement. Critics say blockade constitutes ongoing hostilities. If clock not paused, Trump would need Congressional authorization by May 1 or face legal challenge.
tag_reason: Legal analysis of clock-pausing question is new analytical content. May 1 deadline creates concrete timeline for potential constitutional crisis.
